introSection: Drachenjagd (English: Dragon Hunt) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Legoland Deutschland in Günzburg, Bavaria, Germany.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train used to feature a Lego-build Knight taking up the first row. This figure would be removed a few years later, during a refurbishment of the train. The train's restraints where also replaced during this refurbishment.

fullText:
Drachenjagd (English: Dragon Hunt) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Legoland Deutschland in Günzburg, Bavaria, Germany.



Brown track and supports.

The train used to feature a Lego-build Knight taking up the first row. This figure would be removed a few years later, during a refurbishment of the train. The train's restraints where also replaced during this refurbishment.


 * Drachenjagd on Legoland Deutschland's website (In German)
 * An official PDF of Drachenjagd its stats
